title: ficus palmata subsp. palmata
intro: Ficus palmata subsp. palmata, also known as the Fig Palm or Palm Fig, is a species of evergreen palm tree native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, boasting medicinal properties such as antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ficus palmata subsp. palmata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and sap are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and poultices to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
